{{Quote|Patient has suffered multiple trauma, extreme loss of vital fluids, extensive structural fracture. Survival to date due solely to exceptional restorative capabilities. Recuperation process will be long, and at best uncertain, but according to projection data: possible.|FX9|<ref name="marvel63" />}}
'''FX9''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] shortly following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. FX9 was installed on the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], Vader's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], and was placed in charge of the recuperation of Imperial spy [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] as she recovered in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] after severe wounds suffered while posing as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during [[Operation Earplug]].<ref name="marvel63" />

==Behind the scenes==
Farlie appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Walter Simonson]], illustrated by [[Tom Palmer]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel63" />
